overview: SGA operates four distinct funnels, each with different buying psychology, timelines, and conversion economics. A dentist selling a $2.4M practice is making a once-in-a-career decision over 6-18 months. A patient booking an implant consultation is making a high-emotion decision in 2-8 weeks. These cannot be served by the same system.
namingConvention: Each funnel is labeled with a prefix (PA = Practice Acquisition, DR = Dentist Recruitment, PT = Patient, SP = Specialist Partnership) so email sequences, tags, and automations stay organized across the platform.

funnels.name: Practice Acquisition
funnels.businessGoal: Generate qualified partnership conversations with practice owners doing $1M+ revenue
funnels.timeline: 6-18 months from first touch to signed deal
funnels.funnelType: Diagnose Then Prescribe (Assessment entry) + High-Trust Nurture
funnels.expectedConversion: 2-4% of marketing-qualified leads to signed partnership

channels.content: RSAs targeting 'sell dental practice,' 'DSO partnership,' 'dental practice valuation'
channels.cta: See What Your Practice Is Worth

channels.content: Lamonte Jensen and Dr. Ellingson on the Gen4 model, autonomy, peer collaboration
Pillar pages: 'How to Sell Your Dental Practice,' 'DSO vs Private Practice,' 'What Is a 4th Generation DSO'
Byline articles in Dental Economics, Group Dentistry Now, Becker's
Booth at Dykema, Hinman, state dental meetings. Hosted dinners with 8-12 practice owners
Lamonte Jensen or Pete Wong on Shared Practices, Dental Hacks, Dentist Money Show

leadMagnet.name: Practice Partnership Assessment
leadMagnet.description: A 12-question self-assessment that helps practice owners score their readiness across 4 categories

categories.name: Operational Readiness
categories.focus: How dependent is the practice on the owner for day-to-day operations?

categories.name: Financial Position
categories.focus: Revenue trends, debt load, concentration risk

categories.name: Growth Potential
categories.focus: Technology adoption, service mix, market position

scoringTiers.message: Your practice is well-positioned for a premium partnership. Let's explore what SGA can offer.
You have a solid foundation with room to grow. Here's how partnership could accelerate your trajectory.
You're earlier in the journey. Here's what to focus on over the next 12-24 months.

evaluation.description: Confidential Partnership Guide (deep-dive PDF) followed by Engagement Sequence (8 emails, Days 8-35)

conversion.description: Discovery call with Biz Dev team, followed by site visit, partner introductions, LOI, due diligence, and signing

emailSequences.name: PA-Indoctrination
emailSequences.goal: Establish SGA as the informed, trustworthy alternative to the DSO horror stories they have heard

emails.subject: Your assessment results + what they mean
emails.elements: Score summary, personalized tier message, brief SGA intro, link to full results page

emails.subject: The question every practice owner asks at 2 AM
emails.elements: Acknowledge the late-night googling, mirror their exhaustion, introduce the Gen4 philosophy

emails.subject: What 7 out of 10 dentists regret after selling
emails.goal: Address the elephant in the room
emails.elements: Acknowledge DSO horror stories head-on, cite the '7 out of 10 frustrated or regretful' stat, position SGA's model as the structural counter

emails.subject: How Thurston Group has done this 8 times
emails.elements: 37 years, $4B+ returned, 8 dental/healthcare platforms, Smile Doctors as proof point

emails.subject: Dr. Cavendish was bored after 20 years. Then this happened.
emails.elements: Dr. Cavendish case study (revenues up 16.5%, EBITA beating plan, 100% staff retention)

emailSequences.name: PA-Engagement
emailSequences.trigger: Completed indoctrination OR opened 3+ indoctrination emails
emailSequences.goal: Move from awareness to active evaluation using Gain/Logic/Fear + extensions

emails.subject: GAIN: What your practice looks like 2 years after partnering
emails.elements: Dr. Godat testimonial, specific outcomes, 'amplification not absorption'

emails.subject: LOGIC: The math behind a JV equity partnership
emails.elements: How the equity model works, compare to outright sale, management services, and staying solo

emails.subject: FEAR: The cost of waiting another 3 years
emails.elements: Technology gap widening, staffing crisis intensifying, practice values in flux, retirement timeline shrinking

emails.subject: Your team stays. Your patients stay. Your name stays.
emails.elements: 85% staff retention rate, specific practices that kept their names, staff testimonials

emails.subject: What Dr. Ellingson means by 'protect the profession'
emails.elements: Dr. Ellingson full quote, the autonomy paradox, ADA president speaking at Gen4 event

emails.subject: Three questions your financial advisor should ask about any DSO deal
emails.elements: Education-forward email on deal evaluation criteria, positions SGA as transparent

emails.subject: The Pikos Institute + 4Front: why our dentists keep getting better
emails.elements: CE as the soul of the platform, Pikos Institute for implantology, 4Front for peer collaboration

emails.subject: Ready for a confidential conversation?
emails.elements: Direct CTA to book a discovery call. No pressure framing.

emailSequences.name: PA-Post-Conversation Nurture
emailSequences.trigger: Completed discovery call but did not advance to site visit
emailSequences.goal: Keep SGA top of mind without sales pressure during the 6-18 month decision cycle

funnels.name: Dentist Recruitment
funnels.businessGoal: Attract qualified associate dentists and fill open positions across the SGA network
funnels.timeline: 2-8 weeks from application to offer, ongoing passive nurture for future openings
funnels.funnelType: Lead Magnet Funnel (career content entry) + Job Board Optimization

channels.content: Position-specific listings with mentorship, CE, and equity pathway highlighted
Day-in-the-life content from SGA practices, CE event highlights, office tour reels
Optimized listings with differentiated copy
Residency program partnerships, GPR site placements at SGA practices
Articles: 'Working at a DSO Pros and Cons,' 'DSO Dentist Salary Guide,' 'New Dentist Career Paths'

leadMagnet.name: The Associate Dentist's Career Decision Guide
leadMagnet.description: A 15-page guide covering solo vs. DSO vs. partnership track comparison with real numbers, compensation structures, red/green flags, interview questions, and SGA's mentorship model

application.description: Specific job application through ATS intake

conversion.description: Phone screen, clinical interview, practice visit, then 90-day onboarding sequence

emailSequences.name: DR-Nurture
emailSequences.trigger: Downloads career guide OR visits careers page without applying
emailSequences.goal: Move from passive browsing to active consideration

emails.subject: Your career guide + a question most DSOs won't answer
emails.elements: Guide link, introduce SGA's 'career not a production number' positioning

emails.subject: How one associate went from Class IIs to full-arch implants
emails.elements: Story of a Gen4 associate who expanded their clinical skills through mentorship

emails.subject: The benefits nobody lists on the job posting
emails.elements: CE stipends, Pikos Institute access, 4Front symposium, 401(k) with match, equity participation

emails.subject: Open positions that match your goals
emails.elements: Curated list of current openings based on geography/specialty interests

emailSequences.name: DR-Passive Candidate Nurture
emailSequences.trigger: Engaged with career content but did not apply
emailSequences.goal: Maintain relationship with dentists who may move in 6-12 months

emailSequences.name: DR-Onboarding
emailSequences.goal: Reduce first-90-day turnover, accelerate clinical integration

phases.content: Welcome packet, team introductions, first-week schedule, benefits enrollment guide
Practice orientation, clinical systems training, mentor assignment
Weekly check-in emails, first CE opportunity, peer introduction, 30-day feedback survey
Monthly check-in, clinical goal setting, 60- and 90-day surveys, invitation to next 4Front event

funnels.name: Patient Acquisition
funnels.businessGoal: Drive new patient appointments across SGA practices, with special emphasis on high-value implant cases for the MODIS vertical
funnels.timeline: 1-8 weeks from first touch to booked appointment (general: 1-2 weeks; implants: 4-8 weeks)
funnels.funnelType: Split funnel -- Local Search Capture (general) + Content-Led Assessment (implants)

channels.content: Verified practice profiles with high review counts
Before/after transformations (MODIS), community content (general practices)
Dr. Olson transformation videos, procedure explainers, live Q&As
RSAs for 'dental implants [city],' 'full arch dental implants cost,' 'All-on-4 near me'
In-office cards, post-visit text/email with referral link
channels.cta: Refer a friend, both receive $50 credit

leadMagnet.name: Smile Assessment (Implant Vertical)
leadMagnet.description: An 8-question online assessment for potential implant patients
questions: Current dental situation (dentures, partial, failing teeth, missing teeth)
How long they have been dealing with the issue
What bothers them most (eating, appearance, pain, social situations)
Awareness of implant options (none, some research, consulted a dentist)
Biggest concern (cost, pain, surgery, travel, time)
leadMagnet.output: Personalized results page with Smile Readiness Score, relevant patient transformation story, estimated treatment timeline, financing overview, and CTA to book a free virtual consultation

booking.description: Virtual consultation or in-person consult, followed by treatment planning

referral.description: Post-visit review request + referral program activation

emailSequences.name: PT-Implant Nurture
emailSequences.trigger: Completes Smile Assessment but does not book consultation
emailSequences.goal: Overcome fear, build trust, move to consultation booking

emails.subject: Your smile assessment results (and what they mean for you)
emails.elements: Personalized results summary, Dr. Olson intro, link to 2-3 relevant transformation videos

emails.subject: The nurse who finally chose herself
emails.elements: Nurse transformation story, 'putting everyone else first' narrative, before/after photos

emails.subject: What dental implants actually cost (honest numbers)
emails.elements: Transparent price ranges by procedure type, financing breakdown ($199-$349/month)

emails.subject: Scott's first meal with his new teeth was a New York strip
emails.elements: The steak moment. Vivid, specific, sensory.

emails.subject: What to expect on your first visit (no surprises)
emails.elements: Step-by-step walkthrough of consultation process, 'no commitment at your first visit' reassurance

emails.subject: A personal invitation from Dr. Olson
emails.elements: Short, personal email from Dr. Olson. Direct booking link.

emailSequences.name: PT-Post-Treatment Referral Loop
emailSequences.goal: Generate reviews, capture testimonials, activate referrals

emails.subject: How are you feeling? Here's your recovery guide
You're one week in -- here's what to expect next
emails.goal: Generate 5-star review while satisfaction is peak

emails.subject: 30 days of your new smile -- would you share your story?
Know someone who deserves to smile again?
emails.goal: Activate referral. $100 credit for both referrer and referred.

funnels.name: Specialist Partnership
funnels.businessGoal: Attract periodontists, oral surgeons, and implantologists to the MODIS specialty vertical
funnels.timeline: 8-24 months (longer than general practice due to higher complexity and smaller prospect pool)
funnels.expectedConversion: 3-5% of identified prospects to signed partnership

channels.content: Direct outreach to Pikos course alumni, co-branded content with Dr. Pikos
Episodes featuring current MODIS partners telling their story
Marcus Morosin and Pete Wong content: specialty practice growth, implant market trends, PE in specialty dentistry
channels.cta: See if MODIS fits your practice

channels.content: Booth and hosted dinners at AAP Annual Meeting, AO Annual Meeting, Pikos Symposium
Existing MODIS partners introduce prospects from their network

leadMagnet.name: The Specialist's Guide to DSO Partnership
leadMagnet.description: A 20-page white paper addressing specialist-specific concerns: why specialty practices are valued differently, capital investment gaps, scope preservation, Thurston Group track record, case studies (Pensacola Perio, Troy Family Dental, Jacksonville Dental Specialists), and Pikos Institute as a clinical development engine

evaluation.description: MODIS Community Conversations Podcast deep dive, followed by discovery call with Marcus Morosin (VP Business Development)

emailSequences.name: SP-Indoctrination

emailSequences.goal: Establish MODIS as the only specialty-focused DSO with clinical credibility

emails.subject: Your guide + why we built MODIS for specialists
emails.elements: Guide link, Pete Wong intro, the gap MODIS fills

emails.subject: What Thurston learned from US Endodontics Partners and US Oral Surgery Management
emails.elements: Thurston has built specialty dental platforms before, specific precedents

emails.subject: Dr. Pikos on the future of implantology (and why he chose MODIS)
emails.elements: Dr. Pikos quote and endorsement, the Pikos Institute connection

emails.subject: How Pensacola Perio / Coastal Jaw Surgery grew after partnering
emails.elements: Specific partner story with outcomes: capital invested, cases expanded, recruiting solved

emailSequences.name: SP-Engagement
emailSequences.trigger: Completed indoctrination OR opened 3+ indoctrination emails
emailSequences.goal: Move from awareness to active evaluation

emails.subject: GAIN: What your practice looks like with capital, marketing, and a lab behind it
emails.elements: Paint the picture of a fully equipped specialist practice with MODIS resources

emails.elements: Cost of CT scanner, surgical suite, in-house lab, marketing, recruiting -- totaled vs. MODIS providing it

emails.elements: 18-month associate search stat, inability to compete on benefits/equity, succession risk

emails.elements: Explicit reassurance that MODIS supports full-scope specialty practice, not just implants

emails.subject: PE exit timelines: what Thurston's 37-year track record actually shows
emails.elements: Address the 'load up debt, flip in 3 years' fear directly with historical evidence

emails.subject: A conversation with Marcus Morosin (no NDAs, no pressure)

referralLoops.mechanism: Partner introduces a peer practice owner in their network
referralLoops.incentive: Equity appreciation (aligned incentive -- more partners = larger platform = higher equity value)
referralLoops.expectedYield: 1-2 warm introductions per partner per year

referralLoops.mechanism: Hired associate refers a classmate or former colleague
referralLoops.incentive: Referral bonus ($2,000-$5,000 for successful hire that stays 6+ months)

referralLoops.mechanism: Post-treatment referral program with dual incentive
referralLoops.incentive: $50-$100 credit for both referrer and referred

referralLoops.mechanism: MODIS partner introduces a specialist colleague through Pikos network
referralLoops.expectedYield: 1-2 warm introductions per partner per year

interconnections.trigger: Brings existing patient base to network

automationTriggers: When a new partner signs (PA close), automatically trigger DR sequence for open positions at that practice
When a recruited dentist starts (DR close), add their practice location to patient acquisition ad campaigns
When a patient transformation story is captured (PT post-treatment), route to content team for use in PA and SP awareness campaigns
When a specialist partner refers a colleague (SP referral), tag as 'warm intro' and route to Marcus Morosin with context

retentionMechanics.system: Partner Pulse newsletter + quarterly partner calls + annual 4Front symposium
retentionMechanics.cadence: Monthly newsletter, quarterly calls, annual event
retentionMechanics.content: Network growth updates, clinical innovation highlights, peer success stories, market intelligence

retentionMechanics.system: 90-day onboarding sequence + mentor check-ins + CE calendar
retentionMechanics.content: Clinical development milestones, CE opportunities, career pathing, peer cohort connections

retentionMechanics.system: Recall/recare system + seasonal campaigns + referral program
retentionMechanics.content: Appointment reminders, educational content (oral health tips), seasonal offers, referral prompts

retentionMechanics.system: MODIS Community Conversations podcast + Pikos CE calendar + peer case collaboration
retentionMechanics.content: Advanced CE events, clinical case sharing, research updates, network expansion news

reEngagement.trigger: No email opens for 60+ days (B2B) or 90+ days (patients)

emails.subject: Still thinking about it? Here's what changed since we last talked
Quick question (takes 10 seconds)
emails.goal: Single-question survey to re-engage and re-segment

emails.subject: Last note from us (unless you say otherwise)
emails.goal: Give explicit opt-out or opt-back-in. Clean the list.

outcomeLogic: Opens/clicks email 1 or 2: Return to active nurture sequence
Responds to survey (email 2): Re-segment based on response, route to appropriate sequence
No engagement after email 3: Tag as 'cold_unresponsive,' suppress from active sequences, move to quarterly-only cadence

tagArchitecture.usedFor: Move to post-conversation nurture, alert BD team
Remove from all PA prospect sequences
Remove from DR-Nurture, route to ATS
Remove from PT nurture, add to pre-appointment reminders
Remove from all SP prospect sequences

conditionalLogic.action: Immediately remove from ALL prospect sequences; add to Partner Pulse newsletter
Remove from DR-Nurture; start DR-Onboarding; add practice location to PT ad targeting
Remove from PT-Implant Nurture; start pre-appointment reminder sequence
Fast-track: add note to BD team for priority outreach within 48 hours
Route to educational content track (SEO articles, market reports), not sales sequences
Tag as hot_lead; alert BD team for personal outreach (PA/SP) or front desk for phone call (PT)

funnelKpis.leadingIndicators: Assessment completions, discovery calls booked, site visits completed
Guide downloads, applications submitted, interviews completed

funnelKpis.northStarMetric: New patient appointments per practice per month
funnelKpis.leadingIndicators: Smile Assessment completions, consultation bookings, ad CPL
Guide downloads, podcast listens, discovery calls booked

emailHealthMetrics.actionRequired: < 25% -- review subject lines, sender name, send times
< 2% -- review CTAs, content relevance, link placement

tasks: PA Funnel: Build Practice Partnership Assessment, landing page, and PA-Indoctrination sequence. Launch Google Search and LinkedIn campaigns.
PT Funnel (General): Activate Google LSAs for top 10 practices. Implement Google Business Profile optimization protocol.
DR Funnel: Launch LinkedIn Sponsored Jobs for highest-priority open positions.
PA Funnel: Build PA-Engagement sequence (8 emails). Launch conference presence strategy.
PT Funnel (Implant): Build Smile Assessment. Launch PT-Implant Nurture sequence. Begin Meta ad campaigns using Dr. Olson content.
DR Funnel: Build and deploy Career Decision Guide. Launch DR-Nurture sequence.
SP Funnel: Build Specialist's Guide white paper. Launch SP-Indoctrination sequence.
All Funnels: Deploy re-engagement sequences. Implement cross-funnel routing automation.
PT Funnel: Launch post-treatment referral loop. Implement review generation system.
PA + SP Funnels: Launch post-conversation nurture for leads not ready to proceed.
All Funnels: First performance review. Optimize sequences. Scale winning channels.
